title: Pedestrian (74) dies in hospital after Mossel Bay accident
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 74-year-old pedestrian died in hospital after sustaining multiple injuries in an accident in Mossel Bay this week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 74-year-old pedestrian died in hospital after sustaining multiple injuries in an accident in Mossel Bay this week."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The police spokesperson for the Southern Cape, Warrant Officer Chris Spies, said according to reports available at this stage, on Friday 30 January at about 06:30 the man “was hit by a taxi on the corner of 11th Avenue and Louis Fourie Road”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“A post-mortem to determine the cause of death will be conducted. Mossel Bay Police opened a case of culpable homicide for further investigation. No arrests have been made,” said Spies.","html":"“A post-mortem to determine the cause of death will be conducted. Mossel Bay Police opened a case of culpable homicide for further investigation. No arrests have been made,” said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information which could assist the police with the investigation may contact the investigation officer, Warrant Officer Francois Pick, with the Mossel Bay Detectives at 044 606 2823 or 082 7787 304.","html":"Anyone with information which could assist the police with the investigation may contact the investigation officer, Warrant Officer Francois Pick, with the Mossel Bay Detectives at 044 606 2823 or 082 7787 304."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victim’s identity was not available at the time of publishing.","html":"The victim’s identity was not available at the time of publishing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Pedestrian (74) dies in hospital after Mossel Bay accident
